action.reasoning: Observation: AugReg ViT-B/16 training completed successfully (8 epochs, val_acc 0.7605). Best accuracy so far is 21.32% with CLIP ViT-B/16 + SWAD. I have ~1.27 hours and 2 iterations remaining. Analysis: Ensembling CLIP (vision-language pretrained) with AugReg (supervised IN-1k with AugReg recipe) should improve OOD generalization on Quickdraw by combining different inductive biases. The two models have different pretraining objectives and features, so they likely make different errors. Decision: Update predict.py to ensemble CLIP best + AugReg SWAD with equal weights (50/50), verify checkpoints are loadable, then submit eval.
